notes: Top-level Game questions were verified from screenshots/screenshots/问卷全no.png on 2026-06-03.
The all-No Summary baseline is recorded in docs/baseline_all_no.md.
The Fear=yes, Scary elements=yes, Rare probe is recorded in docs/probe_yes_fear.md.
The Fear=yes, Scary elements=yes, Often probe is recorded in docs/probe_yes_fear_often.md.
The Fear=yes, Horrifying elements=yes, Rare/Often probes are recorded in docs/probe_yes_fear_horrifying.md.
Yes branches are not complete yet. Keep hidden child questions as N/A rather than coercing them to no.

2026-06-07 structure probes expanded the map from top-level/Fear-first-pass to additional deep branches across Violence, Sexuality, Gambling, Language, Controlled Substance, Crude Humor, Digital Purchases, and Miscellaneous.

Some deep leaf Yes/choice branches are recorded as visible but still marked children_explored=false until every sequential leaf option is explicitly toggled and confirmed not to reveal more questions.

questions.prompt: Does the game contain inferences of, references to, or depictions of violence, blood, or gory images? This includes violence directed at the player's character. Please note that this question does not refer to user-generated content.
Violence or implied violence against humans
Violence against anything other than humans (e.g., animals, fantasy creatures, robots, vehicles)
Disturbing or gory images without a violent act shown.
Blood that isn't directly related to a violent act (e.g., blood on clothing, blood in the background, blood resulting from performing surgery)
In what kind of setting (context, storyline) does the violence occur?
Does the game have a pixelated or childlike style?
How would you describe the reactions to violence?
Referred to
Implied but not seen
Rarely depicted from a distant perspective
Often depicted from a distant perspective
Rarely depicted from a close-up perspective
Often depicted from a close-up perspective
What is the level of blood and/or gore associated with this violence?
Does the game take place in a realistic or historical war setting?
Can innocent or defenseless characters be seriously injured or killed?
Are there any fierce sounds, sinister or intimidating characters, or dark overtones associated with this violence?
Does the game contain pictures or sounds likely to be scary, horrifying, or disturbing? Please note that this question does not refer to user-generated content.
Scary elements
Horrifying elements
How frequent are the scary elements?
How frequent are the horrifying elements?

Does the game contain inferences of, references to, or depictions of sexuality, sexual violence, suggestiveness, dating games, revealing attire, or nudity? Please note that this question does not refer to user-generated content.

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Does the game include the purchase or sale of digital goods, cash rewards, gift cards, play-to-earn features, convertible cryptocurrency rewards, or the issuance of transferable digital assets (e.g., NFTs)?
Does the game natively allow users to interact or exchange content with other users through voice communication, text, or sharing images or audio?
Does the game share the user's current and precise physical location with other users?
Does the game contain any swastikas, other Nazi symbols or propaganda deemed unconstitutional in Germany?
Does the game contain any content that can substantially erode the national identity of the Republic of Korea by describing anti-national acts or distorting historical facts?
Does the game advocate committing acts of terrorism?
Does the game contain realistic descriptions of crimes (e.g., robbery, kidnapping) or techniques that can be used in criminal offenses?
Is there an intense and unrelenting sense of imminent threat?
In what kind of setting (context, storyline) does the violence occur?
Does the game have a pixelated or childlike style?
How would you describe the reactions to violence?
How is this violence presented in the game?
What is the level of blood and/or gore associated with this violence?
Do any of these creatures behave or respond like humans?
Is any of this violence against real-world animals?
Are there any fierce sounds, sinister or intimidating characters, or dark overtones associated with this violence?
How explicitly depicted are these disturbing or gory images?
What best describes this type of blood in the game:
How often do sexual acts occur?
What is the duration of these scenes?
Obscured/Innuendo - Sex act is either entirely off-camera or completely blocked from view
Shown with No Nudity - Characters are depicted in a sexual act but no nudity is shown
Shown with Partial Nudity - Breasts, Buttocks
Shown with Full Frontal Nudity
Do any of these sex acts feature characters that appear to be younger than 18?
Suggestive references and innuendo in text, dialogue, or heard
Overtly sexual situations or visually depicted innuendo
References to sexual activity without descriptive detail
References to sexual activity with descriptive detail
Sexual situations involving those who appear to be under 18
Are these dating games prominently featured or a strong focus of the product?
Revealing Outfits
Nudity
How is the sexual violence in the game presented?

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Purchases of digital goods

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Cash Convertible Rewards - Cash rewards, real-world items of significant monetary value, convertible cryptocurrency rewards or other play-to-earn mechanics

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Issuance (e.g., minting) of transferable digital assets (e.g., NFTs)

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Can these purchases include random items where the purchaser doesn't know what specific items or features they will receive (e.g., loot boxes), the purchase of items that will be used to create or unlock an unknown item or feature (e.g., a key to unlock a loot box, material used to craft a random item), items that can improve the rate of earning random items (e.g., random drop boosts), or any other chance-based purchases?

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Does the game have a system for players to trade items with each other using real money or in-game currency purchased with real money? (e.g. auction house, item exchange)

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Does the game include the ability or requirement to wager, purchase entrance fees, additional chances to win, boosts, or any other purchases potentially related to earning or winning cash rewards or rewards of significant monetary value?

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Is the issuance of these digital assets a significant or promoted aspect of the product?

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Does the game contain an integrated marketplace for these assets or promote/feature a particular marketplace for these assets?

questions.section: Digital Purchases, Cash Convertible Rewards, or NFTs
questions.prompt: Does the game include the ability or requirement to make any purchases related to the issuance or earning of these digital assets?
Does the game include the ability to block users or user-generated content?
Does the game include the ability to report users or user-generated content?
Does the game include chat moderation?
Can interactions in the game be limited to invited friends only?
Are these crimes or criminal techniques likely to be imitated by children or youths?
Are there detailed descriptions of techniques that could be used in criminal offenses?
